Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elviras coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Dr Dawn Harper and Dr Ranj Singh go head to head in the messy shaving foam paper marbling challenge, and Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wins four basketball season tickets and needs someone to share them with, but finding compatible companions proves more difficult than she could have imagined. Comedy, starring Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug persuades Carrie to help Deacon with the cooking and childcare over Thanksgiving. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon fight over a childhood toy, while Arthur discovers Carrie is buying him an expensive Christmas gift and decides to splash out on something equally costly in return. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Victor Williams and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur becomes convinced he is addicted to nasal spray, while Carrie persuades Doug to see a therapist to help him with his eating habits, with a little too much success

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray keeps visiting Roberts new apartment, which always seems to be swarming with pretty girls - until Debra puts in an appearance and curtails his enthusiasm. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The spirit of Christmas is in short supply when Ray gives his parents a personalised toaster and they sneak off to exchange it for a coffee machine. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover his father let him win a game of table tennis when he was 12, and indignantly demands a rematch, determined to secure a legitimate victory this time. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles is shocked when his former wife Maris asks for his help, deciding it is best to keep it a secret from the heavily pregnant and overemotional Daphne. Frasier goes back to private practice, but finds that treating patients face to face is a real test. Guest starring Dan Castellaneta (The Simpsons) and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles is suspected of being an accomplice to murder when his former wife Maris uses his crossbow to kill her husband - and Frasier does not help matters by accidentally suggesting his brother should receive the death penalty

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier are set up on a blind date by a mutual friend, while Martins gun goes off in the apartment - leaving Niles and Daphne to conceal the damage. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Fountain Cottage in Bellingham, Northumberland. The hosts are hoping their award-winning cafe will give them the edge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Georgia and Paul invite the BandBers into The Shuckburgh Arms in Stoke Doyle. The guests are amazed by the converted barns but things hit a snag when not everyone sleeps soundly. Michael complains of a broken fridge disturbing his slumber but by feedback time, Georgia and Paul are confident theyve done enough to be victorious on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Great Yarmouth to visit Stu and Lous Beachside Holidays. A boat trip brings the group together but a dirty discovery brings down the mood, leaving the hosts concerned about their chances of success on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Alice in Wonderland-themed Hatters Hotel in Skegness, Lincolnshire. Husband-and-wife team Dee and Gary reckon their unique BandB experience will have their guests grinning like Cheshire cats - and the literary decor certainly proves a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the competition. Michael and Danielle from Fountain Cottage arent happy with one set of BandBers who declined a return visit, while The Shuckburgh Arms Georgia and Paul get the snooze blues about one guests complaint

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two house-hunters with different needs - Indu and Jason, who in 2018 wanted to find a family home with potential in Guildford, and fashion designer Shane, who was keen to leave the bustle of the city and make a new life on the north Kent coast way back in 2003. Now Phil Spencer returns to find out if the homes that he and Kirstie Allsopp found have reaped rewards

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Lucy Shepherd gets a taste of a traditional party and local delicacies, and visits a baobab tree that has been a birthplace for generations. As they navigate dense forest, the ever-present threat of elephants looms nearby. With rations running dangerously low, Lucy must put everything she has learned from the hunter-gatherer lifestyle to the test

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Visits to a fortress-style hotel in the Empty Quarter in the United Arab Emirates, a minimalist hotel on the tranquil banks of a Norwegian river, a futuristic fantasy with three bespoke treehouses in Dorset woodland, an eco-friendly yellow submarine on the river banks of County Monaghan in Ireland, and a luxury hotel fashioned from repurposed shipping containers in the New South Wales Australian outback

programme.title: Living (2022)
programme.desc: Overwhelmed at work and lonely at home, a council bureaucrat in the 1950s life receives a medical diagnosis telling him his time is short. Influenced by the lifestyles of a decadent writer and an activist working to transform a bomb site into a playground, he makes a supreme effort to transform his dull life. Drama, starring Bill Nighy, Aimee Lou Wood and Tom Burke

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Former nanny Amber wants to have beautiful babies on a farm - but it remains to be seen whether her dashing date has the film star looks she is after. Magician Clint is keen to conjure up a meaningful connection with kooky artist Sanna from Finland, while 79-year-old man about town Jan hopes to be free-spirited 74-year-old widow Chrissys perfect leading man

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Guy Martins Best Bits
programme.sub-title: Guy Martins World Speed Records (edited version)
programme.desc: The presenter looks back at times when he helped to build and pilot amazing machines to world speed records, and tells the fascinating stories behind the record attempts

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three sets of dinner-party hosts from Plymouth compete, beginning with newlyweds Nicole and Nathan, who offer a fine-dining experience. On the second night, Tracey and Daryls confidence is dented when their guests point out a few culinary mistakes, while the final soiree sees Richard and Sonya present an Irish-themed menu - but Tracey is on critical form

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver showcases a one-pan recipe to provide a perfect solution for busy life - a foolproof traybaked salmon in a bag

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George tackles two very different properties from the Georgian architectural period. First, he visits a townhouse in Yorkshire, which features high ceilings, a grand staircase and a heavy chandelier hanging from the original ceiling. Later, he travels to the Peak District, where he comes across a farmhouse which is in desperate need of a transformation

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to prove he pays Carrie enough attention, but it is an uphill struggle - especially as he also has a Super Bowl party to organise. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur gets a new mobile phone, while a mix-up means Doug and Carrie are given another couples photographs. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie inadvertently sets her friend up on a date with her boss, while Doug spends Valentines Day delivering penguins to the zoo. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie travel to the Caribbean, but their holiday in the sun is interrupted by a phone call from Arthur, who has a serious problem on his hands in the basement. Sitcom, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is angry to learn Ray threw a party in her house 20 years previously, and responds by spurning him in favour of Robert. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Doris Roberts and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray are asked to film a video tribute to Frank, who has been named Man of the Year at his lodge, but find none of the other members can stand him

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank is injured just before going on a Caribbean cruise with Marie, so Ray takes his place, sharing a tiny cabin with his mother and being mistaken for her lover. Meanwhile, Robert faces up to the challenge of looking after Frank. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Maris murder case makes Niles a celebrity, but its not long before a jealous Frasier seizes the chance to regain his place in the spotlight. Meanwhile, Rozs arrogant sister Denise gets her comeuppance. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: KACL staff compete against a rival station in a weight-loss challenge. Frasier refuses to participate, but Roz offers herself as part of the prize. Meanwhile, Niles struggles to cope with the sleepless nights caused by an unusual symptom of Daphnes pregnancy

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Amy Gledhill, Ed Gamble, Roger Sanchez, Mollie King, Matt Edmondson and Brad Alexander. With music by Reverend and the Makers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family sees a different side to Grampa when he revisits his days as Gorgeous Godfrey - the most feared and villainous TV wrestler of all time. Mr Burns reveals he was a huge fan and persuades the old man to put on his spandex suit and return to the ring for one last fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A routine check reveals Homer is not qualified to work as a safety inspector at the power plant, so he goes back to college to study for a degree - but spends all his time playing pranks and ends up failing his exams

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first venue of the week is Daisy Bank Camp in Hebden Bridge, Yorkshire, where guests take a trip to a local conservation farm and enjoy a locally sourced breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Katie and Jess The Lion and Swan in Congleton, Cheshire and while first impressions are good, the cracks soon begin to show as Andrew and Angie are driven insane by the traffic and Emma is unimpressed by the price tag at breakfast. With plenty of grumbles from their guests, will Katie and Jess be pleased with their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three is to The Three Hills, Cambridge. Hosts Emma and Emily are hoping the award-winning food will be enough to guarantee their success but things get off to a rough start with some cleanliness concerns. After an afternoon out punting and a brilliant breakfast, the hosts feel confident but their joy is short lived when the feedback comes in

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Darren and Jamie look to lay on a magical experience for the BandBers in the weeks final visit, at their wizard-themed Hotel of Wizardry in Great Yarmouth. The guests are certainly spellbound by the hotels quirks to begin with, but the magic soon wears off when they find that not everything is quite as it should be

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Angie and Andrew from Daisy Bank Camp want to shed a light on some facilities faults, The Lion and Swans Katie and Jess pour cold water over some kettle confusion, while Emma and Emily from The Three Hills want two BandBers in particular to open up on their comments about a lack of space. After the dust has settled, they then learn the identity of the winner

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada (2006)
programme.desc: A woman with dreams of becoming a journalist takes a job as assistant to the editor of a prestigious fashion magazine - a position that should guarantee a bright future if she succeeds. Unfortunately, she has just signed up to work for the boss from hell, whose cruel personality and outrageous demands make her life a nightmare. Comedy drama, with Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, Amelia Dimoldenberg, Sarah Beeny and Maxine Peake take on a Signature challenge that takes cupcakes to a new level, and in the Technical they try not to get into a flap with a classic. They open their hearts in the Showstopper, as they recreate their most memorable romantic date in biscuit form. Wholl be going home with the Star Baker Apron?

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: A guide to far-flung corners of the world, filmed on board cruise ships. In this first episode, a ship navigates the low-slung bridge that spans Yokohama Harbour, while another voyages to Alaskas glacial ice fields. In the Mediterranean, another ship glides into the Sicilian port of Messina, where guests Claire and Guy scale the smoking craters of majestic Mount Etna

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: In London, a 90-year-old sings the Frank Sinatra classic that gave him back his voice after he had a stroke. A 15-year-old performs an original tune about growing up Black in Britain. An 83-year-old from Derry sings a song that she gave up 30 years ago because it made her daughter cry, and a father and son perform the lullaby thats always been their song

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics sit back to watch cosy Channel 4 show Your Song, long-running quiz University Challenge and new judges Anna and Grace taking charge of MasterChef. They also give their thoughts on Im a Celebrity South Africa, The Assembly, Made in Chelsea and news coverage of Prime Ministers Questions

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Documentary following pioneering surgeons at Royal Marsden Hospital as they face some of the most complex and challenging oncological cases in the world. A surgical robot is used to treat a tumour on a patients voice box, in a procedure that has never been attempted before. Other surgeons perform a complex procedure to save a photographers arm, and remove new cancer growth in a patients abdomen

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordons late-night investigation of Mrs Whites Golden Rule Cafe turns up shocking results, and a bombshell reveals a secret financial crisis. Will the 101-year-old proprietor and her 75-year-old son Larry ever hand over the reins and retire?

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The chefs thorough late-night investigation of MacGregors unearths far scarier secrets than the ghosts that are rumoured to haunt the restaurants dining room - mouldy leftovers, frozen produce and the previous owners discarded belongings. Burdened by the past, and up to her neck in debt, new owner Stephanie allows head chef Mike, whos also her boyfriend, to cut corners in the kitchen. Can Gordon orchestrate a fresh start?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family sees a different side to Grampa when he revisits his days as Gorgeous Godfrey - the most feared and villainous TV wrestler of all time. Mr Burns reveals he was a huge fan and persuades the old man to put on his spandex suit and return to the ring for one last fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A routine check reveals Homer is not qualified to work as a safety inspector at the power plant, so he goes back to college to study for a degree - but spends all his time playing pranks and ends up failing his exams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe has a chance encounter with a couple of rich venture capitalists who invest in the barmans home-made whiskey. Grampa injures himself while babysitting Bart, but quite enjoys being looked after by his grandson, and Lisa attends a jam session at the Jazzhole - only to find none other than Bleeding Gums Murphy on the bill

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen meets Trevor, whos 86 and has dedicated decades to creating his very own Venetian palazzo in Staines, from plunging light wells to vaulted ceilings and lavish waterways. On the Isle of Wight, Laurence takes a trip to Poppys kawaii home of ice-cream lights, doughnut sprinkles and cotton candy walls. The interior design expert also meets Sonia, whos been both thrifty and nifty in her maximalist mini mansion

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Edinburgh compete to win the £1,000 prize, including competitive couple Kenny and Lisa, who believe their dishes are good enough to be served in a restaurant. Later, duo Julie and Keith hope to get away with preparing two very similar courses, before final hosts Kate and Mike hope to impress their rivals with a Tex-Mex menu

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a property in Yorkshire which is part Victorian stone farmhouse and part brick extension, with interiors that are outdated and in need of renovating. Meanwhile in Buckinghamshire, George meets the owners of an 18th century gatehouse who need help changing the layout of their living room

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Paralympian Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla persuades Sam to hire an older woman to replace Diane, but it is not long before he turns his amorous attention to the new barmaids daughter. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla calls together her ex-classmates from St Cletes School for Wayward Girls to plot revenge on her sadistic former principal when she spots her drinking at Cheers. American bar-room comedy, starring Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane rings Sam, hoping for a better offer after Frasier pops the question while they are in Italy. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Shelley Long and Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra takes Ally and the twins to her parents house, leaving Ray at home by himself - and he finds it impossible to get to sleep. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A desperate Ray does everything he can to get to the front of the queue to meet the New York Mets 1969 team at the National Baseball Hall of Fame. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tells Debra she takes up too much room in bed - but he comes to regret complaining when she banishes him to the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Ann Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Maris is released on bail and placed under house arrest, only to embroil an unwitting Niles in a madcap scheme to flee the country. Meanwhile, Frasier is forced to take care of Rozs insurance agent Ann. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Julia Sweeney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes take a trip to the mountains for a holiday away from the city, but Frasier, Niles and Daphne are plagued by nightmares during the overnight journey. Martin also has a strange dream, but unlike the rest of the family, continues to sleep soundly

Frasier goes back to private practice, but finds that treating patients face to face is a real test. Guest starring Dan Castellaneta (The Simpsons) and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles is suspected of being an accomplice to murder when his former wife Maris uses his crossbow to kill her husband - and Frasier does not help matters by accidentally suggesting his brother should receive the death penalty

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier are set up on a blind date by a mutual friend, while Martins gun goes off in the apartment - leaving Niles and Daphne to conceal the damage. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Fountain Cottage in Bellingham, Northumberland. The hosts are hoping their award-winning cafe will give them the edge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Georgia and Paul invite the BandBers into The Shuckburgh Arms in Stoke Doyle. The guests are amazed by the converted barns but things hit a snag when not everyone sleeps soundly. Michael complains of a broken fridge disturbing his slumber but by feedback time, Georgia and Paul are confident theyve done enough to be victorious on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Great Yarmouth to visit Stu and Lous Beachside Holidays. A boat trip brings the group together but a dirty discovery brings down the mood, leaving the hosts concerned about their chances of success on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Alice in Wonderland-themed Hatters Hotel in Skegness, Lincolnshire. Husband-and-wife team Dee and Gary reckon their unique BandB experience will have their guests grinning like Cheshire cats - and the literary decor certainly proves a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the competition. Michael and Danielle from Fountain Cottage arent happy with one set of BandBers who declined a return visit, while The Shuckburgh Arms Georgia and Paul get the snooze blues about one guests complaint

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two house-hunters with different needs - Indu and Jason, who in 2018 wanted to find a family home with potential in Guildford, and fashion designer Shane, who was keen to leave the bustle of the city and make a new life on the north Kent coast way back in 2003. Now Phil Spencer returns to find out if the homes that he and Kirstie Allsopp found have reaped rewards

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Lucy Shepherd gets a taste of a traditional party and local delicacies, and visits a baobab tree that has been a birthplace for generations. As they navigate dense forest, the ever-present threat of elephants looms nearby. With rations running dangerously low, Lucy must put everything she has learned from the hunter-gatherer lifestyle to the test

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Visits to a fortress-style hotel in the Empty Quarter in the United Arab Emirates, a minimalist hotel on the tranquil banks of a Norwegian river, a futuristic fantasy with three bespoke treehouses in Dorset woodland, an eco-friendly yellow submarine on the river banks of County Monaghan in Ireland, and a luxury hotel fashioned from repurposed shipping containers in the New South Wales Australian outback

programme.title: Living (2022)
programme.desc: Overwhelmed at work and lonely at home, a council bureaucrat in the 1950s life receives a medical diagnosis telling him his time is short. Influenced by the lifestyles of a decadent writer and an activist working to transform a bomb site into a playground, he makes a supreme effort to transform his dull life. Drama, starring Bill Nighy, Aimee Lou Wood and Tom Burke

programme.title: Babylon (2022)
programme.desc: Film assistant Manuel Torres yearns to rise through the ranks in 1920s Hollywood, starting with a lowly position working for matinee idol Jack Conrad. Manny is smitten with ingenue Nellie LaRoy, who intends to achieve big screen fame. Their fates entwine with a motley crew of wannabes and hangers on. Writer/director Damien Chazelles comedy drama, starring Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie and Diego Calva

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordons late-night investigation of Mrs Whites Golden Rule Cafe turns up shocking results, and a bombshell reveals a secret financial crisis. Will the 101-year-old proprietor and her 75-year-old son Larry ever hand over the reins and retire?

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The chefs thorough late-night investigation of MacGregors unearths far scarier secrets than the ghosts that are rumoured to haunt the restaurants dining room - mouldy leftovers, frozen produce and the previous owners discarded belongings. Burdened by the past, and up to her neck in debt, new owner Stephanie allows head chef Mike, whos also her boyfriend, to cut corners in the kitchen. Can Gordon orchestrate a fresh start?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Guy Martins Best Bits
programme.sub-title: Guy Martins World Speed Records (edited version)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three sets of dinner-party hosts from Plymouth compete, beginning with newlyweds Nicole and Nathan, who offer a fine-dining experience. On the second night, Tracey and Daryls confidence is dented when their guests point out a few culinary mistakes, while the final soiree sees Richard and Sonya present an Irish-themed menu - but Tracey is on critical form

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders

programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is angry to learn Ray threw a party in her house 20 years previously, and responds by spurning him in favour of Robert. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Doris Roberts and Brad Garrett

programme.desc: Robert and Ray are asked to film a video tribute to Frank, who has been named Man of the Year at his lodge, but find none of the other members can stand him

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: KACL staff compete against a rival station in a weight-loss challenge. Frasier refuses to participate, but Roz offers herself as part of the prize. Meanwhile, Niles struggles to cope with the sleepless nights caused by an unusual symptom of Daphnes pregnancy

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Amy Gledhill, Ed Gamble, Roger Sanchez, Mollie King, Matt Edmondson and Brad Alexander. With music by Reverend and the Makers

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son hit the road together again, but this time they are staying closer to home and heading for Europe as they travel from Essex to Italys Amalfi coast. Their first stop is the Netherlands, where they try out the sport of canal jumping, before the pair don Lycra for a spot of velodrome track cycling alongside a world champion, and take on the worlds tallest freestanding climbing wall

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney continue their European adventure in Germany. They head to the city of Frankfurt, where Brad is pushed to the edge, literally, as he attempts to abseil down the side of a building, facing forwards. The boys also make a stop at a bratwurst-themed hotel and soak up some local Bavarian culture when they have a go at finger wrestling. The pair finish off their time in Germany with a wet and wild adventure in the mountains

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son continue their European adventure in Switzerland, where they take a ride on a mountain rollercoaster before exercising their vocal chords when they try the Swiss tradition of yodelling. The following day, Barney arranges a unique way for them to enjoy some local cheese, and then drive to the Contra Dam, where Barney reveals they are about to attempt one of James Bonds most famous stunts

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son continue their European adventure in Slovenia, where Brads passion for bikes gives Barney an excuse to take his dad motocross racing. They meet a beekeeper and are treated to some unusual honey therapies, before joining the national quidditch team in the capital Ljubljana, and having a go at the notoriously dangerous sport of ski jumping

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo continue their European adventure in Italy, starting in the picturesque Lake Garda, where Barney surprises his dad by explaining theyll be running off the top of Monte Baldo and paragliding over the lake below. The next day Bradley is treated to a hair-raising ride in a Formula 1 speed boat, before the Walshes are invited to the home of opera superstar Andrea Bocelli

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo embark on the final leg of their European road trip as they explore more of Italy, engaging in gladiatorial combat in Rome, before continuing south and making a stop to soak up the views from a sky-high zipwire. As they reach their final stop on the Amalfi Coast, they get the chance to swim in the sea, but theyll have to dive in from a cliff

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son embark a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, aiming to experience extremes from the fiery heat of the Mediterranean to the icy tundras of the Arctic Circle. They begin in Croatia, where they swing off the roof of Hajduk Splits football stadium, before diving headfirst into the crystal-clear waters of the Adriatic. The action continues when the pair go head-to-head on aqua bikes alongside a former world champion, before heading to the capital Zagreb to meet a young inventor, who stuns them with his electric creation

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Hungary, where they take to the open waters of Lake Balaton for a spot of high-speed catamaran sailing with an Olympic crew, before warming up in their RV with some goulash. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Professional BMX rider Lee wants to ramp up the excitement on his big day, by putting his fiancee Amy at the centre of an extreme sports display. However, his bride-to-be has always dreamed of a fairytale princess wedding, complete with a castle, cupcakes and champagne

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party animal Harry aims to impress his perfectionist bride-to-be Rosa with a Bollywood-inspired extravaganza, complete with dancing, tuk tuks and an elephant, but she is dreaming of a stylish, vintage wedding that is all about romance and tradition

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fashionista groom-to-be James arranges a cutting-edge, catwalk fashion show ceremony full of the latest trends for his and his fiancees big day. However, bride-to-be Jenna is dreaming of a traditional and timeless wedding that will never go out of style

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven Newman, CEO of department store chain Loehmanns, views his company from a different perspective when he goes undercover as an aspiring entrepreneur visiting the shops after winning a reality TV contest. And thats when he learns first-hand that the employees are the foundation of the company

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, the Chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the companys founder, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open her own restaurant. Her aim is to uncover where the company is going, what plans for the future should include and whether her fathers values are still being upheld

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberrys in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his sons entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesakes magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his sons entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, inviting Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont to compete against Rob Brydon and Joe Wilkinson. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate, while Huge Davies joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Bewilderness
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy and music from the Grand Theatre, Swansea, as the star of the Bafta-winning sitcom Black Books recalls incidents from his colourful career and parodies contrasting styles of music, from Belgian jazz to the EastEnders theme tune

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Its July 12 and the Quinns are rushing to get out of town before the Orange Parades start. They are packed and nearly ready to go when James, Michelle and Clare arrive as unexpected members of the escape party. To make matters worse, Aunt Sarah has recently started reading tarot cards and is predicting disaster for this trip - and it seems that for once, she might just be right. The only question is, when and how will things go wrong? Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Jamie-Lee ODonnell, Dylan Llewellyn and Nicola Coughlan

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin is over the moon when she manages to secure herself the editorship of the school magazine, The Habit. Especially when she uncovers an explosive story. Orla become obsessed by step aerobics, Da Gerry gets into trouble with Ma Mary and love is in the air for Aunt Sarah. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Louisa Harland, Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Kathy Kiera Clarke

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Extended version of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr. Jon Richardson and Sean Lock are joined by Richard Bacon, Gemma Collins, Katherine Ryan and Henning Wehn to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Jack Dee, Claudia Winkleman, Josh Widdicombe and Mel Giedroyc to answer questions based on opinion polls, finding out who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, inviting Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont to compete against Rob Brydon and Joe Wilkinson. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate, while Huge Davies joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: As the wedding planning show gets an upgrade, grooms-to-be are now given £14,000 to plan every detail of their nuptials - although they must still do so without any input from their significant others. The latest run gets under way by introducing Andrew, who hopes a big-top-themed wedding will distract his bride-to-be Jenni from the troubles she faces on a daily basis. Jennis confidence has taken a knock since she developed a disability caused by pregnancy, and while Andrew became her dutiful carer, he admits romance has taken a back-seat, and hopes an extravagant wedding will help him show his fiancee the spark is still there

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Steve takes turning 40 as his cue to seize the initiative in arranging his wedding to partner Nicki. He aims to recreate their early 1990s courtship with a Guns N Roses-themed ceremony that caters to their shared love of rock. However, unbeknownst to her would-be-husband, Nicki only pretended to be a fellow rocker to catch Steves eye. She is actually dreaming of a traditional affair at a stately home, and may not be as welcoming of a rock video-themed big day as her fiance believes

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Childrens entertainer Mark wants to stage a theatrical wedding on a cruise ship for his bride-to-be Kelly. However, having waited 10 years to tie the knot, she is hoping for a traditional event and may not be enthusiastic when she discovers the outrageous plans he has for their big day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Anthony Wedo, president and CEO of Buffets, Inc, goes undercover to find out what his staff members are really like. He was brought on to the team to turn the firm around after years of challenges and poses as a construction worker to find out the flaws in the business

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Amit Kleinberger, the CEO and co-owner of frozen yoghurt chain Menchies, poses as a participant in a reality TV contest to find out whether consistency is being maintained in his stores. The company has experienced rapid growth and Amit tries to establish what changes must be made to become a billion-dollar business

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Essex, complaints investigator Callum and his wife Alison, have put together a fun-filled menu, despite Callums not-so-cheery nature. Mike and Carol host next, and their guests are shocked when Carol shares an unexpected story about a fiery feud, then theres an outburst over the Essex dialect during dessert. Finally, Tony and Coni have a rustic, hearty theme, and serve three large pies for the main

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Essex, partners Mike and Heather hope to impress their guests with a menu of Mediterranean-inspired dishes, but Fussy eaters Jess and Salv cant hide their true feelings about the starter

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete to throw the best dinner party in the West Midlands. Image-conscious couple Sarah and Jack kick off the competition with a clean-living menu. Their guests think the food is a little too healthy, but the entertainment breaks the ice as everyone lets loose at the silent disco. On day two, foodies Liz and Martin cook an Italian feast from scratch, inspired by recipes from Lizs Italian mother. Finally Carl and Sonya serve up a pub-inspired menu and a huge surprise

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigis in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owners father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Parks Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorges in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duos suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makiss reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike and Nellies Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateurs two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The contestants are treated to a banger of a song sung by Little Alex Horne, but some of them dont entirely appreciate it. Kumail Nanjiani holds Amy Gledhill and Joe Dommett while they ask him questions about shapes and colour, Joanna Page reveals her favourite childhood tipple, and Armando Iannucci goes for an ice cream. As always, Greg Davies hands out points to those who deserve them and withholds points from those who have disappointed him. Exec Prods: Alex Horne, Richard Allen-Turner, Rob Aslett, Andy Devonshire, James Taylor, Jon Thoday; Series Prod: Andy Cartwright; Series Dir: Andy Devonshire; Prod Co: AvalonShort: Alex Horne treats the contestants to a song, but not everyone appreciates it. Kumail Nanjiani embraces Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they ask him questions about a horse. No-naughty-bits version

programme.desc: In his classic debut live stand-up show, filmed at Londons Bloomsbury Theatre in 1996, Bill explains why Bryan Adams is perhaps the greatest ever exponent of the rock anthem; demonstrates the influence that Cockney music has had on the great classical composers; and warns of the perils of a world ruled by insects, while playing the second-biggest gong in Britain

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin and the rest of the gang are excited to attend an outdoor pursuits weekend which aims to bring Protestant and Catholic school kids together as part of a peace initiative. The return of the comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Louisa Harland

programme.desc: Uzzi helps Kyles girlfriend to rid him of a tacky tribute to another lady, and Sketch tackles a tattoo for Gina that is tarnishing memories of her deceased husband

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Seal goes undercover, disguised as a sales executive, to find talented musicians struggling to make it in the music industry

Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? Paul, Mary and their twins go underground as renovations force them to live in their basement. As our twins get to work above ground, will their efforts give the family reason to raise the roof?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in the Spanish resort of Marbella as they competes for the cash prize of £1,000. Stephen and his Colombian boyfriend Juan plan to keep things simple in the kitchen, but two of their guests point out that the chicken is overcooked. At Glenn and Henriettes Mexican evening, the contestants get competitive when theyre let loose on a pinata, and Tristan and Louise hope to inject love into their dinner party - until Stephen gives them frank feedback on the food

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The singletons include 64-year-old self-confessed cougar Lynda, who has now decided she wants to find a more mature man who shares her lust for life. Thirty-eight-year-old meat-loving teacher Marie has to keep her sledgehammer wit in check when she finds out that her date, fellow teacher Davin, is a vegan, and following one of the most excruciating dates in First Dates history, Fred is determined to find 25-year-old DJ Tom love

programme.desc: Homer is filmed fleeing from a wild bear and becomes a local laughing stock. Determined to redeem himself and salvage his reputation, he builds a special protective suit and sets about organising a rematch - to be fought on his terms

programme.desc: Adam finds himself disenchanted with Halloween, while Barry decides to bring his old rapper alter ego Big Tasty back to life. Barry and Joanne meet Elvira, Mistress of the Dark

programme.desc: Beverly encourages Principal Ball to establish a non-athlete senior night, while Ericas friends are not interested in being pre-wedding fun captain so she asks Geoffs sister

programme.desc: In the first elimination challenge of the series, the eight teams have ten hours to construct Lego fairy tales with a twist. Fairy tales and genres are combined at random - think science fiction and Beauty and the Beast, or horror and Little Red Riding Hood - to give a brand-new take on a well-known story. The holders of the Big Brick choose their combinations first, and are also immune from elimination. Which fantastical build will become the stuff of Lego Masters legend - and whose story will end here?

programme.desc: In Penangs capital, George Town, the teams bite off more than they can chew with bulls penis soup, and follow in Jimmy Choos footsteps, before an uphill race to the finish

programme.desc: The group return from Silchester Farm and its not long before everyone finds out about Chuggs and Zeynos secret Scottish rendezvous. Newly single Freddy attempts to embark on a casual fling with his ex Beks

programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the full-frontal dating show, and first into the studio is 23-year-old trans woman Callie from Glasgow, who is looking for a man who is proud to have her on his arm. Next up is 24-year-old product design engineer Luca from Edinburgh, a part-time model who is hoping to find his perfect muse

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which six potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 28-year-old nature lover Oliver from Norwich, who has never had a girlfriend, and 48-year-old building boss Claire from Manchester. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Teacher and self-confessed cougar Marie returns to the restaurant for a date with 32-year-old lighting technician Adrian, while sports enthusiast Stephanie is matched with former rugby player Stuart. Plus, 71-year-old Janet and 87-year-old former soldier George bond over their shared love of travel and even joke about jetting off to Venezuela together

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the first elimination challenge of the series, the eight teams have ten hours to construct Lego fairy tales with a twist. Fairy tales and genres are combined at random - think science fiction and Beauty and the Beast, or horror and Little Red Riding Hood - to give a brand-new take on a well-known story. The holders of the Big Brick choose their combinations first, and are also immune from elimination. Which fantastical build will become the stuff of Lego Masters legend - and whose story will end here?

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: In Penangs capital, George Town, the teams bite off more than they can chew with bulls penis soup, and follow in Jimmy Choos footsteps, before an uphill race to the finish

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: The group return from Silchester Farm and its not long before everyone finds out about Chuggs and Zeynos secret Scottish rendezvous. Jazz and Inga continue to adhere to the boundaries they set within their friendship, but when Jazz introduces new flame Meri to Jules and Jack, it becomes clear that shes struggling to move on. Newly single Freddy attempts to embark on a casual fling with his ex Beks

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The fifth Commitment Ceremony erupts when Juliette exposes some incendiary messages written by Bec, leading to a dramatic departure.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampas metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals for around £1.55 a portion. He cooks up a roast side of salmon with all the trimmings and uses the leftovers in a filo pie, before showing a takeaway lover how to make a lamb burger for a fraction of the price of his usual Friday night fast-food treat. Plus, a woman receives tips on putting unwanted bread to good use

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares roast chicken with all the trimmings, before turning the leftovers into a stew with dumplings, and rustles up cauliflower and broccoli cheese using frozen vegetables. The chef also demonstrates a recipe for making lamb koftas on a budget and shows a woman how to use up the fruit she normally throws away

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Nick Nairn for a trip aboard luxury train the Royal Scotsman. During the journey, James visits the trains kitchens to prepare a traditional duck a lorange. Along the way they stop off at a bakery in a former prisoner of war camp and historic Scone Palace, where they prepare ham and cheese toastie in the grounds

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James takes a trip to the Cairngorms National Park, joined by Nick Nairn. They visit some friendly reindeer and brave the rapids on the River Spey, where they go whitewater rafting

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers visit Dumfries and Galloway, heading to New Galloway and Potterland Farm in Castle Douglas They also make dishes including butter poached lobster served with Scottish bucatini pasta, a lamb and caper pie, and caramelised apple cheesecake, and also learn about Scotlands national poet Robert Burns and his strange dietary requirements

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers explore Lancashire, the county where Dave was born, the duo begin their trip at Morecambe Bay. They also travel north of Liverpool to the market town of Ormskirk, and the village of Tarleton, to visit Croftpak Nurseries. On their travels they cook dishes including lamb chop pakoras with a tahdig, a Lancashire butter and potato pie, and a gingerbread and black cherry trifle with honeycomb topping

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: They Bikers explore Merseyside and The Wirral, dropping in at a forward-thinking farm, a Chinese institution, Sans Cafe at Liverpools docks, Chriss Chippy and The Seafood Shack in the Wirral. They cook dishes including a traditional egg foo yung, and with the pork from their farm visit they add a porky twist, plus their own take on Chris salt and pepper chips

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in north-west Wales, discovering a host of inspiring local producers who typify the areas rich diversify. They meet Maggie, a Nigerian kitchen goddess whose spicy West African dishes are heating up the village of Penygroes, and Steff, whose love of travel inspired him to open his own speciality coffee shop 10 years ago. There are also visits to farmers Matt and Jenny, who grow food by replicating the ecosystems found in the wild, and a bakery that produces Kurdish pasties

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by fellow chef Tony Singh for a tour of the Isle of Skye. Tony begins by visiting a local bakery that doubles as an art gallery. He also learns how to make the local oatcakes. James, meanwhile, is inspired by the seafood to cook a dish using plaice and lovage. The duo then take a boat trip, where they go dolphin spotting, and James cooks up a fresh lobster and langoustine dish with an added Scottish twist

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James visits the Shetland Islands, an area of natural beauty that hes always wanted to see. He gets to hire a vintage car to explore the area, where he learns about traditional fish salting and cooks a tasty vegetable curry at a local social enterprise project. Later on, James learns all about Shetland community spirit and cake at one of their famous Sunday teas, and finally cooks up a Shetland-inspired paella on a beautiful local beach

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are back in the world of desserts for custard week, which sees them serving up floating islands, a summer staple in the technical and a showstopping set gateau that uses custard as the basis. Will any of them prove good enough to win a Hollywood handshake? Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host as the bakers face pastry week. Each baker must show their vol-au-vent making skills, demonstrate a technical ability in creating a savoury snack and finally craft a showstopping 3D pie-scape depicting their favourite story from childhood. With only four places in the semi-final, who will be leaving the competition for good?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: Ill Be Waving as You Drive Away - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Just as Mary falls in love with newcomer Seth Barton, her eyesight begins to worsen. Charles takes her to an optometrist, but the news is not good - Marys vision cannot be saved and she will soon go blind. In denial, Charles does not tell his daughter until she finds to her horror she is completely blind. Mary becomes very bitter over her predicament and having to rely on others for basic needs. Drama, starring Michael Landon

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: Ill Be Waving as You Drive Away - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary is sent to a blind school in Iowa, where she meets Adam Kendall. She refuses to accept his help at first, but he eventually helps her learn to deal with her blindness. When Adam encourages Mary before her return to Walnut Grove, he says a key line that serves as the title of this episode. Meanwhile, the town of Walnut Grove faces bankruptcy as its citizens prepare to move out

Charles takes her to an optometrist, but the news is not good - Marys vision cannot be saved and she will soon go blind. In denial, Charles does not tell his daughter until she finds to her horror she is completely blind. Mary becomes very bitter over her predicament and having to rely on others for basic needs. Drama, starring Michael Landon

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: Ill Be Waving as You Drive Away - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary is sent to a blind school in Iowa, where she meets Adam Kendall. She refuses to accept his help at first, but he eventually helps her learn to deal with her blindness. When Adam encourages Mary before her return to Walnut Grove, he says a key line that serves as the title of this episode. Meanwhile, the town of Walnut Grove faces bankruptcy as its citizens prepare to move out

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
