At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen strikes a departure deal with Miss Isringhausen and orders Farnum to befriend Blasanov so he can monitor any telegrams coming in from Yankton. Bullock gains possession of a safe full of money, while Hostetler and the General acquire a valuable wild horse they hope to sell to the cavalry. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The town is left reeling in the wake of Williams accident, and Hostetler and the General flee in fear of retribution once word gets out that the horse was in their care. Meanwhile, Swearengen finally receives word from Yankton. Drama, starring Ian McShane, Brad Dourif and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The residents of Deadwood face a sad day when Williams funeral is held, and Seth Bullock and his wife prepare to leave the town following their sons tragic death. Meanwhile, Alma offers her answer to Ellsworth. Timothy Olyphant and Anna Gunn star

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A nervous Alma and Ellsworth get married, and Tolliver informs George Hearst of Wolcotts murderous acts. When the engineer is confronted, he takes drastic action with devastating consequences. Wu launches an attack on Lee

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: Tell Your God to Ready for Blood
programme.desc: Seth Bullock and bartender Harry Manning compete for the office of sheriff, and EB Farnum and Sol Star campaign to become mayor. Meanwhile, Swearengen continues to view George Hearst with suspicion. Western drama set in a lawless US town, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: I Am Not the Fine Man You Take Me For
programme.desc: While competition for the roles of sheriff and mayor is hotting up, Jane achieves a captive audience the candidates can only dream of. Swearengen receives a cryptic note informing him of another bloody incident at the Gem, but Hurst later makes his intentions known in a more straightforward message. Meanwhile, Andy Cramed pays an unexpected visit to Tolliver. Starring Ian McShane and Robin Weigert

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Emmy award-winner Brian Cox joins the cast as a flamboyant stage promoter on a mission to introduce a modicum of culture to the residents of the gold-rush town. Hearsts long-serving cook also makes an appearance as the Grand Central chef, and Wu returns with news of a soon-to-arrive group of imported workers. Meanwhile, Bullock uncovers the truth about the Gem killings. Cleo King guest stars

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: In April 1986, workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to try to deal with an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant near the city of Pripyat in Ukraine. Fact-based drama, starring Jared Harris, Emily Watson and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With millions of lives already at risk, Ulana races to warn leading Soviet nuclear physicist Valery Legasov about the threat of second, devastating explosion

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov draws up a plan, but it comes with great risks. Meanwhile, Lyudmilla ignores warnings about her firefighter husbands contamination

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Boris Shcherbina come up with a life-saving idea to remove radioactive debris. Elsewhere, Ulana faces problems as she investigates the explosion

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov, Boris Shcherbina and Ulana Khomyuk risk their lives and their reputations to expose the truth about the Chernobyl disaster

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Reeling from the home invasion, Marissa tries to learn the truth. As Peter comes clean, she must decide how to protect the family

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Sinking into debt, Nate tries to partner with other investors, while Rue is recruited to work as a manager at one of Alamos strip clubs

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton arrests the prime suspect in the shooting of his three fellow law-enforcers. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin and Andre Braugher

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After Dina shares crucial intelligence information, Ellie prepares to petition the town council. Near Seattle, a religious group flees a war. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss goes it alone to investigate the murder of a cop shooter when his colleagues refuse to help him. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin and Kyle Secor

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Howard returns to work, still feeling weak after the shooting, but solves a murder case from her desk to prove her mettle. Gritty police drama, starring Melissa Leo

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Howard returns to work, still feeling weak after the shooting, but solves a murder case from her desk to prove her mettle. Gritty police drama, starring Melissa Leo

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A hostage crisis leads to a 16-year-old murder case being reopened, while Pembleton and Bayliss investigate an elderly man whose wife drowned in the bath. Gritty police drama on the streets of Baltimore, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Clark Johnson

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: As George Hearst threatens to ruin everything that has been established in Deadwood, Swearengen chooses Adams to be his deputy in his dealings with the ruthless mining baron. Harry is persuaded by Nuttall to start a fire-wagon rental business, Langrishe comes up against competition in buying Chez Ami, and Alma Garrett opens the towns first bank amid as much fanfare as the inhabitants can muster

programme.title: The Fugitive (1993)
programme.desc: A doctor is convicted of his wifes murder and forced to go on the run to prove his innocence - but his efforts to find the mysterious one-armed man he believes is the real killer are hampered by a tenacious US marshal. Thriller, starring Harrison Ford, an Oscar-winning Tommy Lee Jones, Sela Ward, Julianne Moore and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: The Cinema List: Video Games
programme.desc: From pixelated beginnings to the big screen, the Cinema List brings you your favourite games that made it to the movies - from Sonic the Hedgehog 3, Street Fighter and more.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke (1967)
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mothers death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearces novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz (1939)
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Setting out to find the wizard who can show her a way home, she is joined on her journey by a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who all hope their own wishes will be granted. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Babe (1995)
programme.desc: A kindly farmer wins a cute piglet, which some greedy humans and jealous animals hope will end up as the Christmas roast. Undaunted, the young pig proves himself useful on the farm and enlists the aid of the resident dog in learning how to herd sheep. Family comedy, starring James Cromwell and Magda Szubanski, with Christine Cavanaugh, Miriam Margolyes and Hugo Weaving among those providing the voices of the animal characters

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)

Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Get Out (2017)
programme.desc: After African American photographer Chris and his white girlfriend Rose visit her wealthy parents, he suspects theres more to the locals than meets the eye. Oscar-winning psychological thriller written and directed by Jordan Peele (Us), starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford and Caleb Landry Jones

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: 47 Metres Down (2017)
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico are trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean. With less than an hour of oxygen left and great white sharks circling nearby, they must fight to survive. Horror, starring Mandy Moore, Claire Holt and Matthew Modine

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: A twisted one-night stand devolves into a serial killers vicious killing spree and a cat-and-mouse chase. Writer/director JT Mollners thriller, starring Willa Fitzgerald, Kyle Gallner, Madisen Beaty and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Jaws 2 (1978)
programme.desc: The seaside resort of Amity is terrorised once again by a man-eating great white shark. While police chief Brody struggles to alert the townsfolk to the magnitude of the danger, a group of teenagers - including Brodys two sons - is adrift at sea in waters hunted by the shark. Director Jeannot Szwarcs thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton, with John Williams once more providing the acclaimed score

programme.title: The Secret of Marrowbone (2017)
programme.desc: A young man and his three siblings have kept the death of their beloved mother secret in order to remain together. However, they are plagued by a sinister presence in their sprawling manor. Writer/director Sergio G Sanchezs horror, starring George MacKay, Anya Taylor-Joy and Charlie Heaton

programme.title: Afraid (2024)
programme.desc: Computer engineering company executive Curtis is coerced into testing a new digital assistant named AIA to secure a lucrative business contract with two tech geniuses. At first, the omnipresent artificial intelligence simplifies day-to-day life. However, AIA becomes dangerously protective of the clan. Writer/director Chris Weitzs sci-fi horror, starring John Cho, Katherine Waterston and Keith Carradine

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with whats left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.desc: A look at the crimes of Andrzej Kunowski, a man so vicious he was nicknamed the Beast after raping and murdering a 12-year-old girl in 1997

programme.desc: Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers as they crack down on crime in cases where time is of the essence

programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nations busiest motorway

programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Irelands border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: An accident on an icy road forces traffic officers to take drastic action, and police also investigate the cause of a two-car collision on a roundabout

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: George Coulam goes on an unsuccessful date, while Jeff Baldwin struggles to thwart Louie Migliaccios bid for control of the Texas Renaissance Festival and former elephant trainer Darla Smith enters the fray with an agenda of her own

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: Jeff Baldwin gains the upper hand over Louie Migliaccio, but Darla Smiths promotion to co-general manager leads to disastrous consequences for Jeff and herself and George Coulam finally lands on the only successor he can trust

programme.title: Man on Wire (2008)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. In 1974 he undertook a daring 45-minute tightrope walk and acrobatic routine on a wire stretched between the two towers of the World Trade Centre. Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Pariss Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge

programme.title: Be Water
programme.desc: A look at Bruce Lees time in Hong Kong making four films, exploring questions of identity and representation through rare archive, intimate interviews, and Lees writings

programme.title: Im Chevy Chase and Youre Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: A look at the life and mysterious death of actor Gary Coleman, who shot to fame as Arnold in hit sitcom Diffrent Strokes

programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years

programme.title: Jackie Stewart

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: The story of Los Angeles most infamous family-run mortuary, when David Sconce took over Lamb Funeral Home in the early 1980s and engaged in morally questionable and inhumane practices to increase his earnings

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: When the Lamb Funeral Homes crematorium is destroyed by a fire in 1986, an undeterred David Sconce finds ways to expand the family business. As allegations of abuse mount, he is eventually arrested and the ensuing police investigation uncovers shocking evidence that points to Sconce being possibly connected to the assault and later death of a rival mortician

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: After members of the Lamb family are convicted of fraud and various other crimes, a murder charge is brought against David Sconce for the death of his rival, but the case is dropped due to a lack of hard evidence. With more than 20,000 families affected by the practices at the Lamb Funeral Home, the case brings about reforms and new regulations to the mortuary business

programme.title: Touching the Void (2003)
programme.desc: Director Kevin Macdonalds acclaimed, hugely powerful documentary recreating the terrifying struggle for survival faced by mountaineers Joe Simpson and Simon Yates, who braved the Peruvian Andes. During the descent, one of the men fell, breaking his leg and forcing his friend to leave him - but remarkably he beat all the odds to survive. The story is told in the climbers own words and features dramatised reconstructions of their ordeal starring Brendan Mackey and Nicholas Aaron

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Newly discovered archive footage and witness accounts reveal the story behind the 1986 nuclear disaster and the heroic efforts made to prevent another explosion

programme.title: Germanwings: What Happened on Flight 9525?
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the crash of an Airbus A320-211 in 2015, which killed 150 people and was found to have been deliberately caused by the co-pilot

programme.title: Benetton Formula
programme.desc: The history of the Formula 1 team led by Alessandro Benetton, told through the memories of its key members and archive footage

programme.title: Right to Fight
programme.desc: Documentary about the pioneers of womens boxing in 1970s New York and their fight to be recognised by the athletic commission

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The boxer speaks about the people who have inspired her career

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Alan J Pakula, who directed films including Klute, The Parallax View, All the Presidents Men, Sophies Choice and Presumed Innocent

programme.title: The Movies
programme.sub-title: The Golden Age of Cinema - Part One
programme.desc: The history of cinema, told through interviews and analysis from some of its greatest directors and talents. The first of a two-part examination of its so-called golden age begins in the 1930s, as talking pictures take hold in Hollywood

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, who starred in movies including The Dirty Dozen, Point Blank and Paint Your Wagon and won an Oscar for Cat Ballou

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Academy Award-winning Francis Ford Coppola, whose films include The Godfather franchise and Apocalypse Now

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: A look at the bonds between pet chimpanzees and their owners,as well as the risks humans take when they raise these animals as members of their families and the risks to the welfare of the animals themselves. The first edition features nurse-turned-exotic animal broker Tonia Haddix as she fights to retain custody of seven chimpanzees bred for entertainment

programme.title: JFK: Destiny Betrayed
programme.desc: Oliver Stones four-part documentary exploring the Kennedy assassination, and questioning the actions of the Presidents political enemies

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The top 10 alien craft, from V-shaped objects to orbs of light to flying saucers

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: An alien race claimed to have been encountered by a military man stationed at Nellis Air Force base in the Nevada desert. Charles James Hall refers to them as the Tall Whites

programme.title: Cutty Sark: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Ben Fogle commemorates the 140th anniversary of the famous ship by stepping aboard to recount the full story of the world-renowned tea clipper, including efforts at restoration

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team follows the search for artefacts from the Second World War, joining marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise a Fairey Barracuda divebomber. Elsewhere, a dig in the Lake District tells the moving story of the Windermere Boys, and in Aldbourne in Wiltshire, archaeologists search for personal items from the most famous American unit of the US army, Easy Company, who were stationed there in 1943 and 1944

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Cameras capture the world from fresh and exhilarating perspectives. This episodes features strange aquatic mammals populating a river in Colombia, a ship marooned in a sea of sand along Namibias notorious Skeleton Coast and a Boeing 727 jetliner hidden in a pine forest. Plus, an unusual pattern is discovered in the Nevada desert

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Skilled pickers hunt down objects with historical, collectible and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners. Scott and Sheldon begin their Alberta picking expedition at the legendary Blackfoot Truck Stop. There, Scott becomes captivated by a white mans totem pole. The challenge now is whether they can successfully uproot it from the ground

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses that are home to massive megalithic structures, and even islands that disappear into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The top 10 alien craft, from V-shaped objects to orbs of light to flying saucers

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-3, a Second World War Soviet fighter that was regarded for its performance at low altitudes and its agility. It was one of the most successful Soviet aircraft designs of the war

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II. Regarded as one of the most important aircraft of the Cold War. It was a major part of the United States Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps, and was also used by many other countries

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: How a lobster led archaeologists to the discovery of an 8,000-year-old neolithic settlement and witnessing the excavation of an Iron Age crouched burial at a secret location in Dorset. Also, Naoise Mac Sweeney visits a modern construction site as it gives up the secrets of an Elizabethan playhouse

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts follows archaeologists as they unearth Britains most spectacular iron-age grave, a chariot burial in East Yorkshire. The programme also follows two other archaeological digs, an Iron-Age hill fort found in North Wales, and the remains of six roundhouses on the bed of Loch Tay in Perthshire, Scotland

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: To take on the deepest wrecks in Scapa Flow, Ross needs to successfully navigate decompression training before heading out with local dive guide Emily Turton to dive on one of the biggest of the Kaiser?s Imperial war ships from the First World War, SMS Karlsruhe. As he explores the eerie relic, Ross tries to understand how and why the German fleet ended up on the Scottish seabed, when they had already surrendered months earlier. Having resolved one enduring mystery, he then heads 600 miles south to meet with ex-serviceman Mark Culwick and dive on an experimental British aircraft carrier submarine built in the 1920s called the M2. This unique vessel was lost in shocking circumstances, with all hands. During his dive Ross starts to understand the horrifying truth ofexactly how and why the 60 men on board never came home

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses that are home to massive megalithic structures, and even islands that disappear into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The top 10 alien craft, from V-shaped objects to orbs of light to flying saucers

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The crucial role ships have played in international conflict over the past 500 years, beginning with the battleships declining influence during the 20th century

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Auschwitz survivors explore the railways part in the Nazis plans to commit murder. Documentary exploring the role of trains in major conflicts of the past 150 years

programme.title: Combat Machines
programme.desc: A look at the machine gun, which came to dominate and even to personify the battlefields of the First World War. When operated in cool temperatures, the somewhat primitive device was able to fire 400 to 600 small-calibre rounds per minute, a figure that was to more than double by the conflicts end, with rounds fed via a fabric belt or a metal strip

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.desc: The Battle of Hastings, fought between the forces of William Duke of Normandy and King Harold in 1066 and regarded one of the most important turning points in British history

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.desc: The Battle of Marathon, which took place in 490 BC during the first Persian invasion of Greece. The Persian king Darius the Great sent an expeditionary force to Greece in retaliation for Athens support of a revolt among the Greek cities of Ionia. When the Persian army landed, it was met by the Athenian army

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitlers government was firmly in the saddle in October 1934 and its anti-Jewish policy was supported by millions of Germans. Openly and publicly, Jews were discriminated against, disenfranchised, and persecuted. The indifference of many countries towards those Jewish refugees forced to leave Germany was evident

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: The invasion of Poland by the German army in 1939, examining how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses that are home to massive megalithic structures, and even islands that disappear into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The life of self-proclaimed faith healer and psychic Edgar Cayce. He became a worldwide sensation in the early 1900s, claiming to receive visions of both the past and future

programme.title: Hitlers British Island
programme.desc: Part one of two. How the Channel Island of Alderney became a pre-occupation of Nazi leader Adolf Hitler and under German control was transformed into one of the most heavily fortified places on Earth. Away from prying eyes, the Nazis also established a concentration camp - the only one on British soil - amid the idyllic scenery of woodlands and silver sand beaches

programme.title: Hitlers British Island
programme.desc: Part two of two. On the orders of Adolf Hitler, the Nazi invaders of Alderney, a tiny island in the English Channel, shipped in more than 5,000 slave labourers to build an astonishing series of fortifications designed to protect the island from attack

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The crucial role ships have played in international conflict over the past 500 years, beginning with the battleships declining influence during the 20th century

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Lost Standard, the Steam Gun and the Sacrificial Throne
programme.desc: This latest collection of objects comprises an intriguing 35,000-year-old box, a steam-powered gun and a monument that may have been an Aztec throne

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: The ancient city of Chichen Itza in Mexico, exploring the construction and purpose of ancient monuments, and how they were built without modern technology

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The life of self-proclaimed faith healer and psychic Edgar Cayce. He became a worldwide sensation in the early 1900s, claiming to receive visions of both the past and future

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Hawker Hurricane was the first RAF aircraft to fly over 300mph. Over half of every enemy aeroplane destroyed in the Battle of Britain was by a Hurricane, not a Spitfire

programme.title: Hitlers Engineers
programme.desc: How the designer of one of the most popular car brands in history, Ferdinand Porsche, would not have seen his success without the support of Adolf Hitler

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team follows the search for artefacts from the Second World War, joining marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise a Fairey Barracuda divebomber. Elsewhere, a dig in the Lake District tells the moving story of the Windermere Boys, and in Aldbourne in Wiltshire, archaeologists search for personal items from the most famous American unit of the US army, Easy Company, who were stationed there in 1943 and 1944

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits a secret location in the Cotswolds, which appears to be a high-status Anglo Saxon cemetery, where she finds a very precious and fragile artefact. A team from Cardiff University is called to the bone cave of Wales to investigate medieval bones protruding from a cliff face on the Welsh coast

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor is joined by advanced technical diver Emily Turton in north Devon, as he prepares to dive down on the wreck of a sunken steam ship. Iona II was heading to America in the early 1860s, when it went down with a mystery cargo on board that the owners went to extensive efforts to recover in secret. The pair embark on a night dive with the hope it will reveal what the owners so desperately tried to covertly retrieve. Determined to get to the bottom of the mystery, Ross also meets with a maritime historian who has uncovered Iona IIs shocking purpose. Ross and maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas head to Plymouth to dive on a newly discovered wreck, and to uncover a staggering artefact that links the site to one of the most controversial and censored periods in British history - the transatlantic slave trade

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross is joined by maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas in Plymouth to deep dive on the wreck site of 36-gun Nelsonian frigate HMS Amethyst - a legendary battle cruiser, launched in 1799, which proved one of the most successful and prolific of the Napoleonic wars. Ross makes an incredible discovery using an underwater metal detector, and the historic item reveals why the ship was such a potent weapon of war, but also gives clues as to how and why it sank

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The life of self-proclaimed faith healer and psychic Edgar Cayce. He became a worldwide sensation in the early 1900s, claiming to receive visions of both the past and future

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: In Guatemala, an old site made up of a series of strange structures is found. On a remote island, a lake full of jellyfish is studied. Argentinian researchers find a complex that may have a dark past, while a flower found in Sumatra gives off a foul scent

programme.title: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: Archaeologists find an ancient structure built on granite columns, puzzling stone spheres are found in Costa Rica and Mexican skeletal remains emerge

programme.title: The Jewish Nazi?
programme.desc: The story of Alex Kurzem, a young Jewish boy who survived the massacre of his Belarusian shtetl during WWII, only to be taken in by the Nazi SS. He witnessed the massacre of his family and entire community by an execution squad. Escaping into the Belarusian woods, he braved a brutal winter alone until his capture by a Latvian battalion that had been absorbed into the SS. Instead of killing him, the soldiers took pity on Alex and gave him a uniform, rifle, and a new name-transforming him into their child mascot

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Search for King Solomons Mines
programme.desc: Fascinating new evidence reveals fresh clues about the whereabouts of King Solomons mines - and the fabulous treasures said to be in them. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: Recounting how, as the war encompassed the globe, the conflict took root in Africa. Mussolini sent ill-prepared soldiers into the field, forcing Germany to come to his aid

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: The US military faced a formidable enemy in Japans forces at sea and in the air. Here, the men and women who fought in the Pacific share their stories

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts question whether the facts of Earths alien past could be buried in areas that - thanks to warfare or instability - are presently off-limits to exploration

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: The unexpected things revealed by catastrophic disasters - both natural and human made - can reveal in their wake. In this episode, fish remains found near an angry Sumatran volcano might suggest a new human migration route and a collapsed kingdom in Turkey is discovered

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: The team members dig into artefacts from a Jamaican port sunk by a devastating earthquake. As they progress, they take a peek at a Minoan landmark and inspect a treasure trove of English relics

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and co-presenter Sarah Cruddas head to central Scotland, which has its own Area 51, known as the Falkirk Triangle, encompassing the now infamous village of Bonnybridge, which claims the highest concentration of the regions UFO activity. They also investigate the alleged abduction of forestry worker Robert Taylor in 1979, the only British UFO incident to have been officially investigated by the police

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts question who the Anti-Christ is, considering that every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Questioning whether technology is going too far, too fast, considering that people rely on machines for virtually every aspect of modern life

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: Ten master artists turn up the heat in glassblowing sculpture challenges for the chance to win $60,000 in prizes and the title of champion. The competitors look to mirrors for inspiration as they create pieces that represent how they see themselves

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: In the second challenge, the nine remaining glassblowers must choose a mystery box and use only the colours inside to make a functional household item. Their work will be evaluated based on design concept, execution and functionality. Items include a cookie jar, a candelabrum and one very sophisticated sippy cup

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Specialists in the field of the extraterrestrial study evidence across 75 million years to validate the theory that there has been extraterrestrial intervention on Earth

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts question whether the facts of Earths alien past could be buried in areas that - thanks to warfare or instability - are presently off-limits to exploration

programme.title: Hell on Earth: WWII
programme.desc: The documentary charts the conflict from the Indian border in Burma to China, at war with Japan since 1937, as well as Hitlers renewed assault on the Soviet Union

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: During the Second World War, the Nazis looted an estimated 600 tons of gold, thousands of pieces of artwork, and millions of priceless artifacts. While some of these items have been found, much of it remains missing. Thanks to top-secret documents acquired over 40 years of research, treasure hunter Darrell Miklos believes some of these stolen riches were loaded into specially modified U-Boats that are currently lying at the bottom of the Caribbean Sea. He and his team of divers and researchers set out to find these lost vessels

programme.title: How to Lose a War
programme.sub-title: The Men Who Gave the Orders
programme.desc: Strategic catastrophes and doomed military decisions, beginning by looking at those in charge whose rampant egos and misguided belief in their own abilities led to their country making fatal mistakes in the war.

programme.title: Secret Sex Lives of Tyrants
programme.desc: Uncovering the truth behind Chairman Mao, founder of the Peoples Republic of China, as a revolutionary image masks absolute power, luxury and ruthless control

programme.title: Ultimate Mysteries
programme.desc: Experts investigate whether Betty and Barney Hill really were abducted by aliens. They also explore the mystery of The Mothman, and Travis Waltons disappearance

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Exploring hidden worlds as myths of gods, giants and cave dwellers emerge from lost mountains, secret tunnels and ancient legends

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Say Hello to My Little Caddy
programme.desc: A seller shuffles into the shop with a football signed by Da Bears, while Chum strikes a jumpman pose as he checks out a Michael Jordan statue

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike visits a time-capsule drugstore in Indiana, and Robbie and Jersey comb through a five-generation farmstead in West Virginia

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Exploring hidden worlds as myths of gods, giants and cave dwellers emerge from lost mountains, secret tunnels and ancient legends

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty Meierotto travels to new hunting grounds by plane to search for an elusive caribou herd. Lauro and Neil build a trapping and fishing camp to help feed their sled dogs. Bret, Ivy and Charleen continue a family fishing tradition on Bristol Bay

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Chance and Soraya slaughter a ram to provide meat for their growing family, while Lauro begins preparation for this years Iditarod by taking his team on a fall training run

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: With the team poised to raise the massive boulder on Lot 8, a shocking artifact is discovered, suggesting a connection to the American Revolution

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino, California, brings out the warrior in Ivy, who goes up against an upstart buyer. Kenny has his eye on a locker that leaves him needing a massage, while Lisa angles for a smaller unit but ends up with the catch of the day

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi lets Danielle lead the way in Santa Ana, California, and their bargain purchase is a trip. Rene takes a gamble on interesting packaging and Ivy discovers that his acquisition may be a total game-changer

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi shows up in Riverside, dressed to distract. Meanwhile, Rene bites off more than even he can chew

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A small animal catches Lisa off-guard, while Ivy and Isaiah barrel their way through a unit, leaving them in need of a drink

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tries to bribe the competition in Canyon Country and becomes more worldly as a result. Ivy and Isaiah make the most of their purchase, while Brandi takes on the powers of darkness

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Montebello, Rene goes head to head with Darrell, buying the sister unit to see if he can finally unseat the King. Meanwhile, Lisa and her dog sneak their way into a locker that earns her stamp of approval

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. In the first edition, five bodies dating from the Bronze Age are found in a deep pit on the Isle of Thanet in Kent. One of them is an old woman, who has been manipulated into a position where she is pointing at something. But at what? And why?

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. This episode comes from Leeds, where remains of children and teenagers have been uncovered beneath a shopping arcade. Analysis of the broken bones reveals that they date back to the industrial revolution, and a thorough examination of the remains provides a detailed picture of the lives these young people would have lived during a tumultuous period of British history

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. This episode comes from Andover, Hampshire, where the construction of a proposed car park outside the city has been held up by the discovery of remains from over 100 young men. The bones are discovered to date back to Anglo-Saxon times, but appear to have been left in a mass grave rather than granted the Christian burial that was normal for their era

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. This episode comes from Leeds, where remains of children and teenagers have been uncovered beneath a shopping arcade. Analysis of the broken bones reveals that they date back to the industrial revolution, and a thorough examination of the remains provides a detailed picture of the lives these young people would have lived during a tumultuous period of British history

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Chasing the myth in Poland as Guy Walters and Justine Ostrowska hunt the Nazi gold train, where obsession and absurdity blur legend and truth

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of six of Britains most famous castles, his journey commencing with a visit to Edinburgh Castle. A popular tourist attraction to this day, Dan explores the history of this famous stronghold that began as an Iron Age battle base and remains a military facility to this day, and was the target of the worlds first aerial bombing

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of the Welsh capitals landmark, Cardiff Castle, and discovers more about its various incarnations over the centuries. Dan learns about the many famous figures throughout history who have spent time within its walls, and discovers more about its redevelopment in the 19th century by architect William Burges, who transformed it into the Victorian gothic fantasy it remains today

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: Written in Blood
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary exploring how the Whitechapel Murders fuelled the rise of tabloid journalism in Victorian Britain, highlighting how the press manipulated the story for its own gain, ultimately obstructing justice in the process. One Fleet Street newspaper in particular - the Star - shamelessly exploitated the killings to boost circulation and profits, hindering the police investigation to further its own agenda. With Moe Dunford, Chelsea Halfpenny, Tyger Drew-Honey and Mark Strepan

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: Written in Blood
programme.desc: With Whitechapel in panic, the Star incites violent anti-Semitic clashes, while the police struggle and the real murderer strikes again and again. At this stage, the moniker Leather Apron is used for the murderer by the press, prior to adopting Jack the Ripper. Moe Dunford, Chelsea Halfpenny, Tyger Drew-Honey and Mark Strepan star in this dramatised documentary

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: Written in Blood
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary exploring how the Whitechapel Murders fuelled the rise of tabloid journalism in Victorian Britain. The so-called From Hell letter sent with a preserved human kidney to the Whitechapel Vigilance Committee chairman George Lusk claimed to be from the killer, although the authenticity of the 1888 document is still debated. With Moe Dunford, Chelsea Halfpenny, Tyger Drew-Honey and Mark Strepan

programme.title: Historys Deadliest with Ving Rhames
programme.desc: Reliving historys deadliest battles, from Cannae and Agincourt to Stalingrad and the Battle of the Bulge

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice

Plus, a perfectly shaped ball of golden fur melts out of the frozen ground of the Yukons gold fields

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A Kazakh farmer discovers ancient burial sites that may determine whether or not the legend of the Amazon women warriors is myth or reality. programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: Part one of two. The naturalist explores the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years, beginning with a look at how remarkable advances allowed primitive fish to make the radical move on to land, and then take to the skies with the advent of flight. He uses fossils of both ancient and living species combined with CGI and film to chart their journey out of the water to populate all corners of the globe

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals

programme.title: Love Is a Dogs Best Friend (2025)
programme.desc: An event planner fosters a mischievous dog, whose chaotic antics lead her to new friendships, love, and self-discovery while preparing for a gala alongside a dog trainer. Romantic comedy, starring Arielle Kebbel and Benjamin Hollingsworth

programme.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: How dogs are trained to use smell for life-saving conservation work and environmental policing. Featuring a South African dog helping to monitor endangered tortoises, a labrador who ensures that non-native zebra mussels do no damage to the habitats of Western Canada, and a whale scat detection dog, who plays a vital role in research into the decline of orca whales

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: A look at how animals use air to their advantage when finding and keeping a mate. Narrated by Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: Examining how airborne creatures navigate the skies, with some routes being short and others across hundreds of miles

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Conmen pose as police officers to steal thousands of pounds from elderly victims, but the ring leader makes a crucial mistake. A shoplifter dances like no ones watching, but she is wrong as security cameras are filming her every move

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: An adventure centre and a garage are burgled, but the businesses own cameras do not show the thiefs face, with the victims turning to street cameras for help. Plus, a partially blind man is deceived at a cashpoint by an unscrupulous thief. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A couple restoring a house, who had earlier disagreed about installing CCTV, but later found the cameras proved their worth after an intruder invaded their dream home. Plus, the man robbing a pizza takeaway who got a taste of his own medicine when another thief took his bike. Presented by Dom Littlewood

programme.title: Rob and Romesh Vs
programme.sub-title: Rob and Romesh vs F1 - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rob Beckett and Romesh Ranganathan enter the world of Formula One, hanging out with the Mercedes team at the Monaco GP, where they meet drivers Lewis Hamilton and George Russell. They also spend time with team principal Toto Wolff, who puts them through their paces to see if they have what it takes to get a job on the team

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Ashley decides he wants to track down his biological father so Vinnie and the gang promise to do everything they can to help find him, but getting the truth out of his family is like getting blood out of a stone. Vinnie unexpectedly finds himself taking new barmaid Sam on a first date, and things take an odd turn when a drunk Carol spills the beans on yet another secret

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Erins brother Ronnie returns to Hawley claiming he has turned over a new leaf, so she reluctantly persuades farmer Jim to let him stay in his spare room, but its not long before Ronnie and his mate Keithy cause total havoc. Erin, Sugar and Carol have a well-earned night out, but the party is cut short when the Rat and Cutters safe is stolen, with Terence McCanns money inside

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Myka and Pete investigate a case belonging to another agent whose body has been discovered in the basement of a St Louis police station. Sci-fi drama, starring Joanne Kelly and Eddie McClintock

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The murder of teenager Connor Lyons, whose body was found in the River Hull, a crime that police realised may be connected to the sale of a bike on social media

programme.title: Border Security: Canadas Front Line
programme.desc: The work of officers of the Canada Border Services Agency as its staff enforce customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws. Whether intercepting suspicious characters, identifying toys packed with drugs or finding weapons disguised as mobile phones, this documentary presents a revealing look at daily life on the front line of national security

programme.desc: The work of officers of the Canada Border Services Agency as its staff enforce customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws. Whether intercepting suspicious characters, identifying toys packed with drugs or finding weapons disguised as mobile phones, this documentary presents a revealing look at daily life on the front line of national security

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A woman who has had plastic surgery while on holiday is caught carrying vials of drugs, the quarantine department find an animals head in the mail, and an unsuspecting passenger has a run-in with a relentless officer

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Customs officers suspect that two men who have arrived separately may be connected somehow, while an aggressive passenger turns nasty, forcing officers to take drastic action. Plus, a suspicious parcel arrives containing an unexpected concealment

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A busy day at Sydney Airport sees officers making a bust, and a passengers mystery bag conceals something significant. Meanwhile, a boxer arrives at immigration ready for a fight

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A nervous passenger breaks into a sweat when he is suspected of carrying drugs, and another denies knowledge of what officers find in his bag. Meanwhile, a traveller with a serious criminal record tells immigration staff a remarkable story

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Cameras rejoin the cheetah family as the mothers collaborate to keep the cubs fed. Plus, the cubs fight to survive abandonment and harsh conditions

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: A return to Iceland to see how its landscapes are changing through the retreat of its glaciers. Every year, their tremendous power alters the nation for ever

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: The ER team tends to a flood of patients as vet Phil stabilises an ailing joey. Meanwhile, senior vet Tim treats a scratched bandicoot

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.sub-title: Indonesia - The Secret Life of Manta Rays
programme.desc: The vibrant reef ecosystem of Raja Ampat, Indonesia, is twice the size of Singapore. See how the mysterious manta ray lives in these waters

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Julz tracks the Kakuli pack and a Manzi faction that has broken away. The Kakumbi make a kill before a happy Manzi reunion

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Julz and Henry track the Kakumbi pups as they face off with a razor-tusked warthog and observe the prides pushing the Manzi from their territory

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Cameras check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralysed

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Ozzy the otter learns to swim with his coach, Leslie, then a look at how Petronel has earned the trust of Riri the rhino orphan, who was traumatised by poachers

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Following the devastating Tsunami of 2011, Japan is going through a seismic crisis. This edition takes a closer look at two of the countrys most dangerous volcanos

programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: South Africas Drakensberg, one of the continents most impressive landscapes and home to sharp climatic and ecological gradients

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: In geological terms, humans have only been around for the blink of an eye. But as this episode shows, they have managed to influence the evolutionary path for many animals

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: From the capybara to the three-banded armadillo, meet some of the worlds strangest-looking animals

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Meet some of natures biggest deceivers - cunning creatures with clever tricks up their sleeves

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Experts investigate the startling similarities between the chicken and the T-rex - creatures that do not seem alike but have more in common than one might think

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: In the animal kingdom, cunning and brute force decide what survives. Some animals have powerful chemical weapons to increase their chances of survival

programme.title: Wild Castles
programme.desc: In Slovenia lies the worlds largest castle that is carved into a cave - a subterranean haven for the regions birds, boars and mountain goats

programme.title: Wild Castles
programme.desc: The Alhambra fortress in Andalusia, Spain, a refuge for wildlife which provides the backdrop for the daily dramas and struggles of the regions amphibians, fish and birds

programme.title: Africas Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: The gruelling challenge facing the wildlife of South Africas coastline as they navigate the areas severe, yet beautiful, landscape

programme.title: Africas Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: South Africas Namaqualand, an arid region that transforms into an amazing sea of colourful flowers after the annual spring rains, showing testament to natures ability to adapt

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: Animals superiority over humans when it comes to the senses, beginning with a look at smell. Detecting chemical scents was one of the first skills was one of the first skills creatures they developed and is vital for finding everything from possible mates to potential predators

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: A look at how some animals have developed an extraordinary sense of touch, and are able to pick up the tiniest vibrations that humans could only dream of

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: One of the most amazing senses in the world, sight helps animals spot their prey - and avoid predators. This episode reveals how creatures throughout nature harness this gift

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: The power of hearing, which helps some animals perceive changes in the environment, whether through the air or through water

programme.title: Macro Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary revealing that when winter comes, many insects have different strategies to see them through - even if they can only ensure that their offspring will live on

programme.title: Macro Worlds
programme.desc: The tiny dangers lurking in a typical meadow, which may seem peaceful and idyllic but is home to praying mantises, ravenous spiders and venomous wasps

programme.title: Macro Worlds
programme.desc: The success of beetles, which have outlived the dinosaurs and conquered almost every corner of Earth, making up a fourth of the animal population

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Cameras follow turtles and tiger sharks roaming volcanic reefs, and tarsiers leaping through forests on the hunt

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The making of David Attenboroughs documentary series charting the evolution of creatures that defy the rules of gravity

programme.title: Americas Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: The animals that live on the border between the US and Canada face many challenges - even politics. This documentary reveals how the boundary affects them over 12 months

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Cameras follow turtles and tiger sharks roaming volcanic reefs, and tarsiers leaping through forests on the hunt

programme.title: Arabian Seas
programme.desc: A look at the marine wildlife in the waters off the Arabian Peninsula, beginning with sharks and rays that patrol Arabias coral reefs for their prey, and the toxic fish that have perfected the art of disguise

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: A look at evolutionary changes that appear invisible to the naked eye, yet the effect of which can be massive

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: The question of sight can be one of life or death in the animal world. See how some creatures have evolved to see perfectly while others can be nearly invisible

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: The importance of cooperation in the animal kingdom, where some creatures work together to be social while others put the welfare of the group above their own potential

programme.title: Mysteries of Evolution
programme.desc: From the shark to the horseshoe crab, meet the planets living fossils - the creatures that have survived relatively unchanged for millions of years

programme.title: Patrick Aryees Wild World
programme.desc: Patrick takes a monumental adventure that explores the breathtaking wild world, beginning by asking whether peoples appetite for salmon is wiping out the lynx

programme.title: Patrick Aryees Wild World
programme.desc: Patrick travels to Yellowstone National Park, where he discovers the positive, top-down domino effect that wolves have on their environment

programme.title: Patrick Aryees Wild World
programme.desc: Patrick is in Costa Rica to witness the annual mass nesting of sea turtles, as well as the predatory jaguars that come in for the kill

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The Bay of Fundy on Canadas east coast, which is home to the worlds highest tides - beneath which lies an intricate maze of invertebrate life

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Dr Alison Cronin and animal manager Jeremy Keeling return from Argentina with chimpanzees Sasha and Kangoo, and Tuans orang-utans receive a treat

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A marmoset family heads to a new home, while Tya returns looking for love and the Barn Woollies welcome Baby Xenia to the group

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Indonesian archipelago in the heart of the Coral Triangle, an area recognised worldwide as the centre of marine biodiversity

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Julz goes on a lion-collaring mission and scout Simon goes fishing. The team witness a vigil for a badly injured Kakumbi pup

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: The Kakumbi mourn the loss of two of their pups and the team witness a standoff between a leopard and a herd of angry elephants

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: A look at Earths most captivating bodies of water. Exploring the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the oceans most mysterious inhabitants, and journeying across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: The Death of Stalin (2017)
programme.desc: The place is Moscow, the year is 1953 and after being in power for nearly 30 years, Soviet dictator Joseph Stalin dies after an inconveniently brief illness. Amid the shock, the members of the Council of Ministers engage in a chaotic bid for power. Armando Iannuccis political satire, starring Andrea Riseborough, Jason Isaacs, Rupert Friend, Simon Russell Beale, Steve Buscemi, Jeffrey Tambor and Michael Palin

programme.title: The Young Messiah (2016)
programme.desc: Biblical drama telling the story of Jesus Christ at the age of seven as he and his family depart Egypt to return home to Nazareth and the youngster begins to discover the true extent of his gifts. Adam Greaves-Neal stars, with Sara Lazzaro, Christian McKay and Sean Bean

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.desc: The youngster asks for a computer and unknowingly sparks a heated argument between his parents over the familys finances, prompting Mary and the twins to move in with Meemaw. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Sneeze, Detention and Sissy Spacek
programme.desc: When his germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford, Sheldon takes extreme measures to remain healthy. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Potato Salad, a Broomstick and Dads Whiskey
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming a marriage counsellor to Pastor Jeff. Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon at home alone. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Raegan Revord

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howards fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Sex Thief (1973)
programme.desc: An audacious cat burglar steals more than his female victims jewellery. Riotous early 70s comedy starring David Warbeck, Jenny Westbrook and Gerald Taylor.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as millionaires, private collectors and antique dealers compete to buy extraordinary items. Banksy experts take a risk on a piece of wall featuring work attributed to the anonymous artist and Tommy Coopers iconic fez goes on sale. Plus, a jar of pickled pig foetuses and an array of Buzzcocks memorabilia

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: Great British Food
programme.desc: Tom Norrington-Davies tries 60 varieties of tomatoes and makes a syrup sponge pudding

programme.title: Great British Food
programme.desc: Tom Norrington-Davies tastes cakes and jams before preparing roast venison, trout and watercress and a real trifle
